_note: Curated catalog of the iconic/endemic Indonesian fauna shown on the /biodiversitas endemic-wildlife layer. Keys MATCH the `taxon` values in scripts/biodiversity-distribution/inputs/endemic-species-id.geojson. Every field is sourced from the IUCN Red List, CITES and peer-reviewed work; where status is uncertain it is stated, never invented. Genus/group labels anchor on their most iconic representative species.

Orangutan.sci: Pongo abelii, P. pygmaeus, P. tapanuliensis

range.id: Sumatra utara (P. abelii & P. tapanuliensis) dan Kalimantan (P. pygmaeus)
range.en: Northern Sumatra (P. abelii & P. tapanuliensis) and Borneo (P. pygmaeus)

habitat.id: Hutan hujan tropis; arboreal, membuat sarang di pohon
habitat.en: Tropical rainforest; arboreal, building tree nests

iucnNote.id: Ketiga jenis Critically Endangered (IUCN). Orangutan Tapanuli kera besar paling langka di dunia (<800 individu).
iucnNote.en: All three species Critically Endangered (IUCN). The Tapanuli orangutan is the world's rarest great ape (<800 individuals).

protected.id: Dilindungi penuh hukum Indonesia; CITES Apendiks I
protected.en: Fully protected under Indonesian law; CITES Appendix I

desc.id: Satu-satunya kera besar Asia, hidup menyendiri di tajuk hutan hujan Sumatra dan Kalimantan. Ketiga jenisnya kritis akibat pembukaan hutan untuk sawit, penebangan, dan perburuan.
desc.en: Asia's only great apes, living largely solitary lives in the rainforest canopy of Sumatra and Borneo. All three species are critically endangered from forest clearance for oil palm, logging and hunting.

range.id: Kalimantan; populasi terbesar di sisi Indonesia
range.en: Borneo; the largest populations on the Indonesian side (Kalimantan)

habitat.id: Hutan bakau dan riparian dataran rendah di tepi sungai
habitat.en: Mangrove and riparian lowland forest along rivers

iucnNote.id: Endangered (IUCN); populasi turun >50% dalam ~36–40 tahun akibat hilangnya habitat & perburuan.
iucnNote.en: Endangered (IUCN); population down over 50% in ~36–40 years from habitat loss and hunting.

protected.id: Dilindungi hukum di seluruh Borneo; CITES Apendiks I
protected.en: Legally protected across Borneo; CITES Appendix I

desc.id: Monyet berhidung besar yang menonjol, khas jantan dewasa, dan hidup di hutan bakau serta tepi sungai Kalimantan. Menjadi maskot konservasi Borneo dan terancam oleh alih fungsi lahan pesisir.
desc.en: A monkey famous for the males' large, pendulous nose, living in Borneo's mangrove and riverside forests. A flagship for Bornean conservation, it is threatened by conversion of its coastal habitat.

endemic.en: Endemic to Indonesia (Java, Bali, Lombok, etc.)

range.id: Jawa, Bali, Lombok, Nusa Barung, Sempu
range.en: Java, Bali, Lombok, Nusa Barung, Sempu

habitat.id: Hutan hujan, hutan pantai, dan hutan pegunungan
habitat.en: Rainforest, coastal forest and montane forest

iucnNote.id: Vulnerable (IUCN); terancam hilangnya hutan Jawa & perdagangan satwa.
iucnNote.en: Vulnerable (IUCN); threatened by loss of Java's forests and the pet trade.

protected.id: Dilindungi hukum Indonesia; CITES Apendiks II
protected.en: Legally protected in Indonesia; CITES Appendix II

desc.id: Lutung berbulu hitam mengilap yang anaknya lahir berwarna jingga terang. Endemik Jawa dan pulau sekitarnya, hidup berkelompok di tajuk hutan.
desc.en: A glossy black leaf-monkey whose infants are born bright orange. Endemic to Java and neighbouring islands, it lives in troops high in the forest canopy.

endemic.en: Endemic to Indonesia (Sulawesi, Togian, Sula, Buru)

habitat.id: Hutan hujan tropis dan tepian sungai

iucnNote.id: Vulnerable (IUCN); laju kelahiran rendah (1–2 anak/tahun) dan sebaran sangat terbatas membuatnya rentan.
iucnNote.en: Vulnerable (IUCN); a low birth rate (1–2 young/year) and very restricted range make it vulnerable.

protected.id: Dilindungi hukum Indonesia; CITES Apendiks I sejak 1982
protected.en: Legally protected in Indonesia; CITES Appendix I since 1982

desc.id: Babi liar khas Sulawesi yang jantannya memiliki taring atas melengkung menembus moncong. Terancam perburuan dan hilangnya hutan.
desc.en: A distinctive Sulawesi wild pig whose males grow curved upper tusks that pierce through the snout. Threatened by hunting and forest loss.

habitat.id: Hutan dataran rendah & perbukitan; bertelur di pasir/tanah vulkanik hangat
habitat.en: Lowland & hill forest; nests in warm sand or volcanic soil

iucnNote.id: Endangered (IUCN); dari 142 lokasi bertelur, 48 ditinggalkan & 51 sangat terancam, terutama akibat perburuan telur.
iucnNote.en: Endangered (IUCN); of 142 known nesting grounds, 48 are abandoned and 51 severely threatened, mainly from egg poaching.

protected.id: Dilindungi hukum Indonesia; CITES Apendiks I
protected.en: Legally protected in Indonesia; CITES Appendix I

desc.id: Burung megapoda endemik Sulawesi yang tidak mengerami telurnya, melainkan menguburnya di pasir atau tanah vulkanik hangat agar menetas sendiri. Anaknya langsung bisa terbang begitu menetas. Terancam oleh perburuan telur yang bernilai tinggi.
desc.en: A Sulawesi-endemic megapode that does not incubate its eggs but buries them in warm sand or volcanic soil to hatch on their own. Chicks can fly the moment they hatch. It is threatened by poaching of its prized eggs.

endemic.id: Endemik Indonesia (Komodo, Rinca, Flores, Gili Motang, Gili Dasami)
endemic.en: Endemic to Indonesia (Komodo, Rinca, Flores, Gili Motang, Gili Dasami)

range.id: Nusa Tenggara Timur; sebagian besar di TN Komodo
range.en: East Nusa Tenggara; mostly within Komodo National Park

habitat.id: Savana, hutan kering, dan lembah pesisir dataran rendah
habitat.en: Savanna, dry forest and low-lying coastal valleys

iucnNote.id: Endangered (IUCN, 2021); total <1.400 individu dewasa dalam 8 subpopulasi; terancam perubahan iklim & kenaikan muka laut.
iucnNote.en: Endangered (IUCN, 2021); fewer than 1,400 adults across 8 subpopulations; threatened by climate change & sea-level rise.

protected.id: Dilindungi hukum Indonesia; CITES Apendiks I
protected.en: Legally protected in Indonesia; CITES Appendix I

desc.id: Kadal terbesar di dunia (hingga ~3 m), pemangsa puncak endemik beberapa pulau di Nusa Tenggara. Ludahnya kaya bakteri dan bisa, dan populasinya kini terancam.
desc.en: The world's largest lizard (up to ~3 m), an apex predator endemic to a few islands in Nusa Tenggara. It has a venomous, bacteria-rich bite, and its population is now threatened.

range.id: Sulawesi, Selayar, Kepulauan Togian, Buton, Muna
range.en: Sulawesi, Selayar, Togian Islands, Buton, Muna

habitat.id: Hutan hujan primer & sekunder, dari dataran rendah hingga ~1.500 m
habitat.en: Primary & secondary rainforest, from lowlands to ~1,500 m

iucnNote.id: Vulnerable (IUCN); terancam pertanian, tambang kapur, dan penebangan liar.
iucnNote.en: Vulnerable (IUCN); threatened by agriculture, limestone mining and illegal logging.

protected.id: Dilindungi hukum Indonesia; CITES Apendiks II
protected.en: Legally protected in Indonesia; CITES Appendix II

desc.id: Salah satu primata terkecil di dunia (~100–130 g) dengan mata raksasa untuk penglihatan malam dan kepala yang bisa berputar hampir 180°. Aktif malam hari di hutan Sulawesi.
desc.en: One of the world's smallest primates (~100–130 g), with enormous eyes for night vision and a head that rotates nearly 180°. It is active at night in Sulawesi's forests.

endemic.id: Berpusat di Papua & New Guinea; sebagian di Aru & Raja Ampat
endemic.en: Centred on Papua & New Guinea; some in Aru & Raja Ampat

range.id: Papua & Papua Barat, Kepulauan Aru, Raja Ampat
range.en: Papua & West Papua, Aru Islands, Raja Ampat

habitat.id: Hutan hujan tropis dataran rendah hingga pegunungan
habitat.en: Tropical rainforest, from lowlands to mountains

iucnNote.id: Keluarga ~44 jenis; kebanyakan Least Concern, beberapa terancam. Bukan status tunggal.
iucnNote.en: A family of ~44 species; most Least Concern, a few threatened. No single status.

protected.id: Dilindungi hukum Indonesia; keluarga Paradisaeidae di CITES Apendiks II
protected.en: Legally protected in Indonesia; the family Paradisaeidae is on CITES Appendix II

desc.id: Burung dengan bulu hias dan tarian kawin jantan yang paling menakjubkan di dunia, ikon budaya dan alam Papua. Diburu untuk bulunya, sehingga perdagangannya diatur ketat.
desc.en: Birds with the world's most spectacular ornamental plumes and male courtship dances, a cultural and natural icon of Papua. Hunted for their plumes, so their trade is tightly regulated.
